description.value:
When your mantle grew and hardened, it incorporated distinctive minerals that forever linked you to the environs. These crystals most often grow in a crown-like pattern above your uppermost eyes. Something about the crystals resonate with their native environment, giving you an intuitive sense for the terrain and its fauna.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Additional Lore] feat for a Lore skill related to the terrain where your mantle formed (such as Ocean Lore or Forest Lore). You can also ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals native to that terrain (as determined by the GM).
